A bolygó megmentése egyetlen emberre hárul, aki képes megszervezni a védekezést ezekkel a nem kívánt látogatókkal szemben. Egy műanyag katonára, akit Sarge-nak hívnak. Tető STATUS 177064 Univerzális vákuumfedél, átmérő 8,2 cm:
	

	
	
	
	The STATUS vacuum lid extends the shelf life of stored foods . You can use it on various containers with a straight edge. The lid creates a vacuum that keeps food fresher longer. It consists of an upper part made of ABS plastic and a silicone seal with a valve. All parts are BPA-free and dishwasher safe. 
    


	

	Key features of the universal vacuum lid STATUS 8.2 cm 177064
	
	
	
		
			Suitable for containers with a straight edge with a diameter of 4 to 7.5 cmCreates a vacuum and extends the shelf life of foodTop made of ABS plasticSilicone gasket and valveMade from BPA-free materialsDishwasher safeOuter diameter 8.2 cm
		
	



	

	Universal use and safe materials
	
	
	The STATUS vacuum lid fits most containers with a straight edge. You can use it on containers whose diameter ranges from 4 to 7.5 cm. The bottom part is made of a silicone seal. The top part is made of ABS plastic. All materials used are BPA-free . After use, simply put it in the dishwasher.

items.raw_desc: Tea Vilgain Pu-Erh tea, 50 g:Vilgain Pu-Erh tealoose black tea, 50 gVilgain Pu-Erh Tea - secondarily fermented dark tea, from hand-picked young shoots and leaves, earthy taste with a distinctive aroma.                     Vilgain Pu-Erh teaVilgain Pu-erh is a traditional Chinese dark tea made from the large-leaved variety of the Camellia sinensis var. assamica from the southwestern province of Yunnan. It is characterised by its bright red colour, delicate earthy flavour and distinctive aroma characteristic of the higher grades of Yunnan teas. Pu-erh is produced by the modern shou (ripe) production method, which uses rapid controlled microbial fermentation, called. wet-piling (wu-doi). This speeds up the entire production process, which traditionally took several decades (sheng method). The tea leaves are then dried, pressed and left to mature. Unlike commonly available Pu-erh teas, VIlgain Pu-erh is made from tiny, golden tips (young shoots) and young, tender leaves, making it a higher class of tea.                     Key Features of...
